case_title: SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. VS. MARTIN LAEUCHLI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SERINA CALHOUN, BUSINESS OWNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN SHETH-SHAH, ACHIRA SHAH, AMITABH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHETH-SHAH, ACHIRA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-04-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERINA CALHOUN (OWNER) AND BETHANY DIEHL (OFFICE MANAGER). DEFENDANT MARTIN LAEUCHLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACHIRA SHETH-SHAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMITA SHAH IS PRESENT. COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ADDING 826-828 CENTRAL HOA AS A NAMED DEFENDANT. COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE DEFENDANTS MARTIN LAEUCHLI, ACHIRA SHETH-SHAH AND AMITA SHAH. PARTIES TO UPDATE THE COURT REGARDING ARBITRATION/MEDIATION STATUS AT THE NEXT HEARING. IF NO EFFORT IS MADE REGARDING ARBITRATION, JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT MARTIN LAEUCHLI. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BTHANY DIEHL, OFFICE MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARTIN LAEUCHLI (REPRESENTATIVE FOR HOA 826-828 CENTRAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT 826-828 CENTRAL HOA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, AMITABH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUL-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUL-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHETH-SHAH, ACHIRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUL-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, AMITABH
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2022 - CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT 826-828 CENTRAL HOA WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERINA CALHOUN (OWNER) AND BETHANY DIEHL (OFFICE MANAGER). DEFENDANT 826-828 CENTRAL HOA, REPRESENTED BY MARTIN LAUCHLI (REPRESENTATIVE). PLAINTIFF UPDATED REGARDING OF ARBITRATION/ MEDIATION THAT THEY HAVE TRIED TO SCHEDULE BUT THERE IS NO AVAILABLITY UNTIL CHRISTMAS SO IT HAS NOT BEEN SCHEDULED. DEFENDANT ORALLY STATED HE WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM AND STATED ONLY UNLESS JUDGE PRO TEM WILL HEAR HIS PETITION REGARDING OF JURIDISCTION AND ADDRESS IT FIRST. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL DEFENDANT APPROVED**
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-04-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
